title: 3. Main Milestones > 3.2 Distribution of User Assistance
text_content: On approval of final drafts of the User Assistance, GPL publishes UA internally to Nucleus, making note in the publication notice that these documents should be hidden to audiences outside of China, and notifies the project team and product distribution. Notification is done by Publication Notices, as described in GPL Authoring Process and according to GPL- maintained distribution lists. The Chinese IFU and Chinese IFU Addendum will not be released until formal NMPA approval is received. China RA will submit the IFU Addendum to NMPA with a placeholder P-number. The IFU Addendum will be updated with a final P- number after the submission and then re-submitted to NMPA for approval during the supplementary period (expected within 90 days after eRPS acceptance). The Chinese IFU Addendum (with new P-number) and Chinese IFU will be released prior to DTR 2 at the end of May 2026.

source: D54550 HAL 4.0 Validation Plan Rev 05.docx.pdf
title: 4. Validation Processes > 4.3 Test Case Management and Approvals
text_content: Test Cases shall be created, reviewed, and approved prior to execution per the Validation W ork Instruction (1), ADLM Guidance (12), and RACI for Design and Development (15). Test records shall be reviewed by a second individual (Validation Manager, Validation Lead, peer Validation Specialist, Product Manager or QA). The approval of the Validation Summary Report/MRD by the Validation representative shall confirm that the test records have received this second review. The documented test process for validation consists of the Test Design Strategy and modular test cases traced to User Needs and acceptance criterion. Selected test cases may trace to more than one user need according to the clinical workflow. Each test case is designed so that the input is targeted at a high-level clinical workflow action and does not state specifically how the user must execute the action. Additional testing instructions
